texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: AWARD OF ORDERS, DECORATIONS AND MEDALS
texts.text: AWARD OF ORDERS, DECORATIONS AND MEDALS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: IN RECOGNITION of outstanding or distinguished, services rendered to the nation in various capacitia and responsibilities, I, Muni Kibaki, President and Contitiander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces of the Republic of Kenya, confer Awards and Honours to the following persons:
texts.text: IN RECOGNITION of outstanding or distinguished, services rendered to the nation in various capacitia and responsibilities, I, Muni Kibaki, President and Contitiander-in-Chief of the Armed Forces of the Republic of Kenya, confer Awards and Honours to the following persons:

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Otder of the Golden Heart of Kenya
texts.text: Otder of the Golden Heart of Kenya

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: - (a) The Second Class: Elder of the Order of the Golden Heart of Kenya (EG.H.)
texts.text: (a) The Second Class: Elder of the Order of the Golden Heart of Kenya (EG.H.)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) The Third Class: Moran of the Order of the GOlditt Heart of Kenya (M.G.H.)
texts.text: (b) The Third Class: Moran of the Order of the GOlditt Heart of Kenya (M.G.H.)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (a) The First Class: ChilkilIthe (a) ning Spear (C.B.S.)
texts.text: (a) The First Class: ChilkilIthe (a) ning Spear (C.B.S.)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (b) The Second Class: Elder of the. Order of the Burning Spear (EB.S.)
texts.text: (b) The Second Class: Elder of the. Order of the Burning Spear (EB.S.)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: (c) The ThirdClass: Moran of the Order of the Burning Spear (M.B.S.)
texts.text: (c) The ThirdClass: Moran of the Order of the Burning Spear (M.B.S.)
